mapper.select: SELECT * FROM family_moment WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE family_moment SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE family_moment SET comment_count = comment_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM family_moment WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM family_moment WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY record_date DESC

SELECT * FROM family_moment WHERE status = 1 AND is_public = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 AND (content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR location LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM family_moment WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND status = 1
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT project_id) FROM family_moment WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND status = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM family_moment WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND status = 1 AND project_id IN
#{pid}

SELECT fm.* FROM family_moment fm WHERE fm.user_id = #{userId} AND fm.is_deleted = 0 AND fm.status = 1 AND YEAR(fm.record_date) = #{year} AND MONTH(fm.record_date) = #{month} ORDER BY fm.record_date ASC
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT record_date) FROM family_moment WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND status = 1
SELECT DISTINCT record_date FROM family_moment WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY record_date DESC
SELECT * FROM family_moment WHERE status = 0 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time ASC
SELECT * FROM family_moment WHERE status = #{status} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
